rationale: BsonSerializationException for MongoDBRef '$ref' element; C#-specific BSON serializer bug, no spec rule cited.

Change stream spec allows FullDocumentBeforeChange to be absent/null when pre-image expires; driver throws cast exception instead.
LINQ3 projection dotted field name computation bug; internal translation error, no spec rule contradicted.
Update uuidhelpers.js shell script to work with mongosh; tooling/script compatibility, not driver behavior.
MongoUrlBuilder produces query strings with ';' separators instead of '&'; connection string spec requires '&' delimiter.
BsonDocumentSearchDefinition render mutability bug; internal API ownership issue, no spec rule involved.
Internal refactor to avoid exception-based flow control in regex translator; no behavior change, no spec issue.
Adding missing $set aggregation stage to builder API; new feature, not a spec nonconformance.

SDAM logs 'Updating stale electionId and setVersion' every heartbeat even when unchanged; comparison logic violates spec update rules.
MongoUrlBuilder.ToString() drops the zstd compressors option; connection string spec requires compressors to round-trip.
LINQ3 incorrectly assumes string serializers always produce strings; internal type-inference bug, no spec rule involved.
Improvement + issue split from DRIVERS-2617; proactive spec-rollout for large change stream events, not a nonconformance.

$vectorSearch filter short-form rendering issue; Atlas-specific feature, not a standard spec area.
Thread-static buffer left in-use state after invalid UTF-8 write; internal buffer state bug, no spec rule violated.
Internal refactor of AggregateMethodToAggregationExpressionTranslator to emit simpler $let-free translations.
